title: vitis aestivalis
intro: Vitis aestivalis, also known as the summer grape vine or fox grape, is a deciduous vine native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis aestivalis include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve pain and inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Vitis aestivalis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy immune system.
